    "section_order": 3,
    "section_text": "Location\n\nIf you perform the following activities:\n\nThe following agreements will apply to you:\n\n**Global**\n\n*   If you use Wise Assistant\n\n*   [Wise Assistant Terms of Use (English Speaking)](https://wise.com/en/legal/wise-assistant-terms-of-use)\n\n**Global**\n\n*   If you use our rate tracking service\n\n*   [Rate Tracker Terms](https://wise.com/gb/legal/rate-tracker)\n\n**Global**\n\n*   If you participate in our “refer a friend” program\n\n*   [Referral Terms](https://wise.com/gb/legal/referral-terms), [(German version)](https://wise.com/de/legal/referral-terms)\n\n**Global**\n\n*   If you use the Airport Lounge Pass feature\n\n*   [Airport Lounge Pass Terms (English)](https://wise.com/gb/legal/airport-lounge-pass-terms-of-use) , [(French)](https://wise.com/fr/legal/airport-lounge-pass-terms-of-use), [(German)](https://wise.com/de/legal/airport-lounge-pass-terms-of-use) , [(日本語)](https://wise.com/jp/legal/airport-lounge-pass-terms-of-use), [(Português)](https://wise.com/br/legal/airport-lounge-pass-terms-of-use)\n\n**Global**\n\n*   If you use the Click to Pay feature\n\n*   [Click to Pay Terms (English)](https://wise.com/en/legal/click-to-pay-terms) , [(French)](https://wise.com/fr/legal/click-to-pay-terms), [(German)](https://wise.com/de/legal/click-to-pay-terms)",

  {

    "section_id": "54672d5a-f78a-47a6-8c10-0aeede4b0068",
    "clause_order": 2000,
    "clause_text": "If you move abroad/change location, your Wise Service provider might change as well and, as a consequence, you will be subject to the Agreements with the respective other Wise entity, as described [here](https://wise.com/help/articles/2932693/how-is-wise-regulated-in-each-country).",

  },
